description_long: This is a four-tier wooden shelving unit with a simple, open-frame design. The shelves are made of planks with a natural wood grain finish, supported by vertical wooden posts at each corner. The top shelf is slightly thicker and features a subtle arch on the front edge, adding a decorative touch. The structure is sturdy, with each shelf evenly spaced and supported by angled braces for additional stability. The wood appears to be finished with a matte varnish, highlighting the natural texture and color variations. There are no doors, drawers, or visible hardware, making it ideal for open storage or display in urban environments such as garages, workshops, or public spaces.
description: A four-tier open wooden shelving unit with a natural wood grain finish and sturdy vertical supports. The design is simple, functional, and decorative with an arched top shelf.
description_view_0: Front view showing all four shelves, the arched top shelf, and the open, symmetrical frame.
description_view_1: Angled side view highlighting the depth of the shelves and the thickness of the wooden planks.
description_view_2: Rear view showing the back of the shelves and the supporting vertical posts, with no backing panel.
description_view_3: Opposite angled side view, similar to view 1, emphasizing the open sides and shelf spacing.
